name: Debbie's Carrot Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the dry ingredients: flour, sugar, salt, baking soda, and cinnamon.
2. Add eggs, oil, carrots, and vanilla extract to the dry mixture. Beat until all ingredients are well combined.
3. Stir in the pineapple, shredded coconut, and half of the chopped nuts.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 50-60 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Allow the cake to cool completely.
7. Frost the cooled cake with Cream Cheese Frosting.
8. Sprinkle the remaining chopped nuts on top of the frosting.
9. Store the cake in the refrigerator.
